AboutSection.title: About Us
AboutSection.text: SEDES's development is technically coordinated by the Caatinga and Desertification Observatory (OCA), a joint initiative of the Federal University of Campina Grande (UFCG) and the National Semi-Arid Institute (INSA), under Decentralized Execution Agreement No. 07/2024 SNPCT/MMA/UFCG, signed with the Department for Combating Desertification and Mitigating the Effects of Drought (DCDE/MMA).
